full_name: Austenitic spring stainless steel X10CrNi18-8, material number 1.4310 (AISI 301)
scope: Lean austenitic stainless steel with restricted nickel that produces a metastable austenite work-hardening rapidly under cold deformation, allowing very high strength (spring tempers). Used for springs, spring washers, wire, flexible connectors and fasteners.

mechanical_properties.condition: solution annealed (base); strength increases greatly with cold-rolled spring tempers
mechanical_properties.tensile_strength_Rm_MPa: 600-950 (annealed); up to ~2000 in high cold-work spring temper

license_note: Grade name (301 / 1.4310) and its nominal composition and typical property ranges are widely reproduced in free manufacturer datasheets and reference sites; no paywalled EN standard text reproduced.
